name: SoulfulLand
short_description: Explore, fight against enemies, collect items, cook to save the paradise. Recruit enemy monsters to your advantage
detailed_description:
Save the mysterious land of monsters, finding the solution of the disorder.
2D exploring action game. Make allies, defeat powerful enemies, and explore everywhere.

Point of this game [/]
  • 3 playeble characters
  • Wide world
  • Simple controls
  • Since there is no order on the stage, you can explore various places freely(But at this moment, it's almost a one-way)
  • You can make enemy monsters your allies(In development)
  • Many items with various effects
  • Collect items and cook
  • Can plant vegetables in the garden
  • Powerful bosses
  • Craft or find weapons and armor to become stronger (* Not yet implemented)[/]

    *Some controlers may not work. If you find any problem with yours, you can report
